events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: wrong insulation type for wet location. Manufacturing/assembly floor likely wet location? Conductor selection & sizing. NEC 310, Table 310.16. Wrong insulation type for wet location is non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk? Wrong insulation in wet location can lead to insulation breakdown, shock, fire. High or critical? In a production floor, wet location exposure, rough-complete. Could be high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 70-80. Value not asked 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Workable empty. Findings: conductor installed has insulation not rated for wet location, violates NEC 310.10(C) maybe. Actions: replace with conductor insulation type suitable for wet location per NEC 310, verify ampacity per Table 310.16. Rationale. References NEC 310.10(C), Table 310.16, maybe 110.3(B). Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
